programme.title: Qualifying -Moto GP - Czechia 2026
programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demandin

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. programme.title: Al Nassr (KSA) vs Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking. All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Vanda Pharmaceuticals Mallorca Championships 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Vanda Pharmaceuticals Mallorca Championships 2026 takes place at the Mallorca Country Club in Santa Ponça, Spain. programme.title: Portugal vs DR Congo - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

programme.title: Argentina vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Argentina and Algeria will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter was a June 2007 friendly – Argentina won 4-3 at Barcelona’s Camp Nou. programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.

programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.

programme.title: Portugal vs DR Congo - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

programme.title: Scotland vs Brazil - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are broadcast live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary. The FIFA World Cup 2026™ will be the 23rd edition of the tournament and the first to feature 48 teams and three host countries: Canada, Mexico and the USA.

programme.title: England vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: England and Croatia are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the semi-final of the 2018 tournament – Croatia won 2-1 after extra-time. This is the fourth match between England and Croatia at a major tournament this century – twice at the FIFA World Cup and twice at the UEFA European Championship. Sweden

programme.title: Ghana vs Panama - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Ghana and Panama. Ghana’s three previous FIFA World Cup matches with CONCACAF teams all came against the USA – the Black Stars won two and lost one. Meanwhile, Panama’s sole World Cup match against an African side was a 2-1 defeat to Tunisia in the 2018 group phase.

programme.title: Uzbekistan vs Colombia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Uzbekistan and Colombia. Uzbekistan’s only previous victory against a CONMEBOL side was in a March 2023 friendly versus Bolivia – they won 1-0 in Saudi Arabia with a goal from their all-time top scorer Eldor Shomurodov.

programme.title: Portugal vs DR Congo - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Congo DR. Portugal’s two defeats against African opposition at the FIFA World Cup both came against Morocco, in 1986 and in the quarter-finals of the 2022 edition. However, they are unbeaten against teams from sub-Saharan Africa at the World Cup, with three wins and one draw.

programme.title: Scotland vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date. Nine of Morocco’s last 12 World Cup matches have come against European teams. In fact, no side has played as many WC matches against European opposition since the 2018 tournament as Morocco.

Argentina are unbeaten in their two previous meetings - a 5-1 win in 1980 featuring Diego Maradona’s only international hat-trick, and a 1-1 draw in 1990, both friendlies played in Vienna. Argentina have lost just one of their last eight World Cup group stage matches against Europ
